name: Woo Community Meetup at WCEU 2026
description: Woo community get-together during WCEU 2026 at the Aquarius riverside restaurant & cocktail bar on the Vistula boulevard.
notes: Fri Jun 5, 2026 · 19:00–22:00 CEST · Aquarius Restaurant, Bulwar Czerwieński 81, Kraków. Shadi, Dustin, Abdo & Bart RSVP'd. Same evening as the Yoast × Bluehost Glow Party (20:00, Panorama Forum) and the Kinsta founders dinner (20:00, Sheraton) — all riverside / Old Town, plan to hop between.

items.name: Address
items.description: Aquarius Restaurant & Cocktail Bar, Bulwar Czerwieński 81, 30-069 Kraków
